samples.text: A car runs normally for hours with an empty fuel tank. Is this expected based on common sense?
A car drives normally for hours on an empty tank. Does this match everyday common sense?
An automobile operates for hours with no fuel in the tank. Is this expected based on common sense?
Engines need fuel to run. With an empty tank a car cannot run for hours. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
A car runs normally for hours with an empty fuel tank. A blue car is parked outside. Is this expected based on common sense?
